title: Consumer prices rose 3.8% annually in April, the highest since May 2023
summary: Consumer prices increased 3.8% annually in April, exceeding the expected 3.7% and reaching the highest level since May 2023. The increase signals persistent inflation pressures in the economy.
content: The consumer price index was expected to increase by 3.7% annually in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

zh.title: 四月消费者价格年涨3.8%，创2023年5月以来新高
zh.summary: 四月消费者价格年涨3.8%，超过预期的3.7%，创2023年5月以来最高水平。这一增长表明经济中存在持久的通胀压力。

title: UK borrowing costs hit highest for 18 years as uncertainty over PM continues
summary: UK borrowing costs have reached their highest level in 18 years amid uncertainty about the Prime Minister's future. The possibility of a change in leadership has unsettled investors and driven bond yields higher.
content: The possibility of a change of leadership in the UK has unsettled some investors and sent bond yields higher.

zh.title: 英国借贷成本创18年新高，总理前景不确定
zh.summary: 在总理前景不确定的背景下，英国借贷成本已达18年来的最高水平。领导层可能发生变化已经动摇了投资者信心，推高了债券收益率。

title: US inflation hits three-year high of 3.8%, driven up by surging energy costs
summary: US inflation reached a three-year high of 3.8% in April, driven primarily by surging energy costs amid geopolitical tensions. The measure reflects the economic impact of the Iran conflict on consumer prices.
content: The key measure of US inflation rose in April to its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

zh.title: 美国通胀创三年新高3.8%，地缘政治紧张推高能源成本
zh.summary: 美国通胀在四月创三年新高3.8%，主要由于地缘政治紧张局势下能源成本飙升。这一数据反映了伊朗冲突对消费者价格的经济影响。

title: This dot-com survivor says AI build-out is more like 1997 than 1999 — and still urges investors to hold more cash
summary: A veteran of the dot-com era argues the current AI build-out resembles 1997 rather than the crash-prone environment of 1999, suggesting further growth ahead. Despite drawing comparisons to pre-crash speculation, the analyst recommends investors maintain elevated cash positions.
content: The riveting gains for microchip stocks have many analysts drawing parallels to 1999, just ahead of the dot-com crash, when the build-out of a key technology led to parabolic moves and frenzied speculation.

zh.title: 互联网泡沫幸存者：AI建设更像1997年，投资者应持有更多现金
zh.summary: 一位互联网泡沫时代的资深人士辩称，当前的AI建设更像1997年而非容易崩溃的1999年环境，暗示增长仍有空间。尽管与崩盘前的投机相比较，该分析师建议投资者维持较高的现金头寸。

title: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
summary: eBay has rejected GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it neither credible nor attractive. Analysts questioned GameStop's ability to finance the deal and the strategic rationale behind it.
content: Many analysts questioned the deal, citing questions about how GameStop would finance the transaction and the strategic rationale.

zh.title: eBay拒绝GameStop的560亿美元收购要约，称其"既不可信也不具吸引力"
zh.summary: eBay拒绝了GameStop的560亿美元收购要约，称其既不可信也不具吸引力。分析师质疑GameStop融资该交易的能力和其战略理由。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls of the day: Nvidia, Broadcom, Tesla, Lowe's, Disney, Intel & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on major stocks including Nvidia, Broadcom, Tesla, and Intel. The trading day featured multiple analyst upgrades and downgrades on key market players.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

zh.title: 周二重磅分析师评级：英伟达、博通、特斯拉、劳氏、迪士尼、英特尔等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师对包括英伟达、博通、特斯拉和英特尔在内的主要股票发表了重要评论。交易日出现了多个关键市场参与者的分析师上调和下调。

title: Inflation jumps to 3-year high, CPI shows, and that’s not the end of it
summary: US inflation surged to a three-year high of 3.8% in April, primarily driven by elevated gas prices. Economists warn that inflationary pressures are likely to persist, continuing to squeeze consumer finances.
content: The U.S. inflation rate leaped to a nearly three-year high of 3.8% in April because of higher gas prices — and the pain for consumers isn’t going away soon.

zh.title: 通货膨胀跳升至3年高位，CPI数据显示，这还不是终点
zh.summary: 美国4月通货膨胀率飙升至3年高位3.8%，主要由汽油价格高企推动。经济学家警告称，通胀压力可能会持续，继续挤压消费者的财务状况。

title: Amazon accelerates delivery race with 30-minute drop-offs in dozens of U.S. cities
summary: Amazon is accelerating its delivery competition by introducing 30-minute drop-off options across dozens of U.S. cities. The move extends the company's ongoing push to compress delivery times beyond existing two-day and next-day offerings.
content: Amazon has been gradually speeding up its delivery windows, after getting customers hooked on two-day and next-day shipping.

zh.title: 亚马逊加速配送竞争，在美国数十个城市推出30分钟自提服务
zh.summary: 亚马逊通过在美国数十个城市推出30分钟自提选项来加速配送竞争。此举扩展了该公司持续推动的压缩配送时间的努力，超越现有的两天和次日配送选项。

title: I’m 68. Is it wise to invest my $500,000 retirement savings with a single investment firm?
summary: A financial advice column addresses whether concentrating $500,000 in retirement savings with a single investment firm is prudent for a 68-year-old. Relevant protections include Securities Investor Protection Corporation coverage limits of up to $500,000 for securities.
content: The Securities Investor Protection Corporation provides coverage of up to $500,000 for stocks, bonds and mutual funds, including up to $250,000 in cash.

zh.title: 我68岁了。将50万美元的退休储蓄投资给单一投资公司是否明智？
zh.summary: 一个财经建议专栏讨论了将50万美元的退休储蓄集中投资给单一投资公司对于68岁老人来说是否谨慎。相关保护包括证券投资者保护公司对证券的最高50万美元的保险范围。

title: Buy this drone stock as demand for unmanned aircrafts grows, Goldman Sachs says
summary: Goldman Sachs has initiated buy-rated coverage on a drone manufacturer, anticipating growth in unmanned aircraft demand. The investment bank's backing reflects confidence in the sector's expansion potential.
content: The bank initiated coverage of the drone name with a buy rating.

zh.title: 高盛看好无人机需求增长，建议买入相关股票
zh.summary: 高盛对一家无人机制造商启动了买入评级，预期无人机需求将增长。这家投资银行的支持反映了对该行业扩张潜力的信心。

title: UK MPs are turning on PM Starmer — Now analysts say he's unlikely to last the year
summary: UK Members of Parliament are increasingly critical of Prime Minister Starmer, with analysts revising expectations to suggest he may not survive the year. The political pressure signals growing internal party dissent.
content: Analysts have slashed the odds of Starmer facing a leadership challenge by September.

zh.title: 英国议员转向反对首相斯塔默——分析师称他不太可能度过今年
zh.summary: 英国议会成员越来越多地批评首相斯塔默，分析师修正预期，认为他可能无法度过今年。政治压力显示了党内不满情绪日益增长。

title: The ‘godfather of crypto’ predicts $1 million bitcoin, but it’s going to fall first
summary: Michael Terpin, a prominent crypto figure, predicts Bitcoin will eventually reach $1 million but expects a significant correction first based on his theory of four-year price cycles. Another bear market is anticipated before the next bull run.
content: Michael Terpin explained his theory of four-year cycles in the bitcoin price that bottom during midterm-election years. One more correction is coming before another bull market.

zh.title: "加密货币教父"预测比特币将达到100万美元，但首先会下跌
zh.summary: 著名加密货币人物迈克尔·特尔平预测比特币最终将达到100万美元，但基于他的四年价格周期理论，他预期首先会出现显著调整。在下一轮牛市之前，预计还会出现另一次熊市。

title: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
summary: A high-stakes summit between Trump and China's Xi Jinping could reshape geopolitics around trade, Taiwan, and Iran. China experts expect potential announcements including Chinese purchases of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.
content: China experts anticipate Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.

zh.title: 特朗普与习近平高风险峰会中的贸易、台湾和伊朗问题
zh.summary: 特朗普与中国领导人习近平之间的高风险峰会可能重塑围绕贸易、台湾和伊朗的地缘政治局势。中国专家预计可能宣布中国购买美国农产品或波音飞机。

title: Hims & Hers plummets 15% after first-quarter loss, weak earnings guidance
summary: Hims & Hers stock fell 15% following a first-quarter loss and disappointing earnings guidance. The company's financial challenges emerged despite a March partnership with Novo Nordisk to sell the GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy.
content: Hims & Hers reached a deal with Novo Nordisk in March to sell its GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy on its platform.

zh.title: Hims & Hers因首季亏损和弱指引下跌15%
zh.summary: Hims & Hers股票在首季度亏损和令人失望的盈利指引后下跌15%。尽管该公司在3月与Novo Nordisk达成合作销售GLP-1减肥药Wegovy，但仍面临财务困难。

title: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
summary: Retail investors are exhibiting aggressive trading behavior around artificial intelligence stocks unseen since the Covid-era trading boom. Options buying in major tech stocks has reached its heaviest 10-day pace since 2021.
content: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.

zh.title: 人工智能超级反弹推动散户投资者行为最激进，自疫情以来最甚
zh.summary: 散户投资者在人工智能股票上表现出的激进交易行为是自新冠疫情时代交易热潮以来最严重的。主要科技股的期权购买已达到自2021年以来最强劲的10天速度。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Can Starmer ‘keep calm and carry on?'
summary: UK PM Keir Starmer confronts a growing party rebellion that threatens his leadership stability and ability to govern effectively.
content: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces a crunch cabinet meeting this morning, after failing to quell a growing party rebellion.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：斯塔默能否"保持冷静，坚持下去"？
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默面临日益增长的党内反叛，这威胁到他的领导地位稳定和有效执政的能力。

title: European stocks to open lower as hopes for U.S.-Iran peace deal fade
summary: European stock markets are expected to decline as U.S.-Iran peace negotiations stall, signaling prolonged geopolitical tensions ahead.
content: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory as prospects for a speedy resolution to the U.S.-Iran war appear increasingly remote.

zh.title: 随着美伊和平协议希望消退，欧洲股市将低开
zh.summary: 由于美伊和平谈判陷入停滞，欧洲股市预计将下跌，预示着前方地缘政治紧张局势将持续。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Trump and Xi face a test over AI control
summary: AI security emerges as a critical negotiating priority as Trump prepares for his first presidential visit to China, reflecting superpower competition over technological dominance.
content: The stakes for AI security have risen sharply in the runup to the first trip to China by a sitting U.S. president in nearly a decade.

zh.title: CNBC的《中国连接》通讯：特朗普和习近平面临关于人工智能控制的测试
zh.summary: 在特朗普为其首次总统访华做准备之际，人工智能安全成为关键的谈判优先事项，反映了两个超级大国在技术主导权上的竞争。

title: Behind Big Oil’s first-quarter beat: The quiet rise of trading desks
summary: European oil majors reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter profits, with trading operations emerging as a significant driver of financial performance.
content: Europe's oil supermajors highlighted trading contributions as they reported stronger-than-expected profits through the first three months of the year.

zh.title: 大石油公司首季度超预期业绩背后：交易部门的悄然崛起
zh.summary: 欧洲石油巨头报告了强于预期的首季度利润，交易业务成为财务表现的重要推动力。

title: Asia's trillion-dollar titans are powering — and distorting — its fastest growing stock markets
summary: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi indices hit record highs, yet experts warn the rally may be overly dependent on a few AI-focused semiconductor companies, raising concentration risk.
content: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi stock markets have been seeing record breaking rallies. The stunning surge leaves experts wondering if this growth hinges largely on a few AI-linked semiconductor giants.

zh.title: 亚洲万亿美元巨头推动——也扭曲了——其增长最快的股票市场
zh.summary: 台湾加权指数和韩国综合指数创下历史新高，但专家警告这波上涨可能过度依赖少数几家专注于人工智能的半导体公司，存在集中风险。

title: Why joining the family business was James Reed’s hardest decision — and why it paid off
summary: James Reed, CEO of the family-owned Reed company, reflects on his pivotal decision to join the family business and the leadership lessons it taught him about risk and avoiding stagnation.
content: James Reed reflects on the decision that defined his career — taking the risk of joining the family business. The Reed CEO discusses failure, purpose and why standing still is the worst decision of all.

zh.title: 为什么加入家族企业对詹姆斯·里德来说是最艰难的决定——以及它为什么有回报
zh.summary: 家族企业里德公司首席执行官詹姆斯·里德反思了他加入家族企业的关键性决定，以及它教给他的关于风险和避免停滞的领导力课程。

title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
summary: Trump and Xi are scheduled to meet in Beijing this week amid critical diplomatic talks, with multiple Asian developments expected to influence the agenda.
content: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.

zh.title: 特朗普本周准备与中国领导人习近平会面，亚洲需要关注的五件事
zh.summary: 特朗普和习近平定于本周在北京会面进行关键外交谈判，多项亚洲动态预计将影响议程。

title: Trump puts Taiwan arms sales, Hong Kong jailed activist Lai on agenda ahead of meeting with Xi
summary: Trump has signaled that Taiwan military assistance and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai will be central topics in his Beijing summit with Xi.
content: Trump said Monday that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai would be among the issues at the summit in Beijing.

zh.title: 特朗普在与习近平会面前将台湾军售和香港被监禁活动人士赖列入议程
zh.summary: 特朗普表示台湾军事援助和香港媒体大亨赖的监禁将成为他与习近平北京峰会的核心话题。

title: Iren’s stock pulls back as investors assess the steep price of the AI buildout
summary: Iren's stock declined following its Nvidia partnership announcement as investors weigh the substantial capital costs of AI infrastructure expansion, though analysts suggest the market reaction may be excessive.
content: Iren will take on debt in the wake of its new Nvidia partnership. One analyst said Monday’s stock drop is an overreaction.

zh.title: 投资者评估人工智能基础设施建设的高昂成本，艾瑞股票下跌
zh.summary: 艾瑞宣布与英伟达的合作伙伴关系后股票下跌，投资者权衡人工智能基础设施扩张的巨大资本成本，尽管分析师认为市场反应可能过度。

title: Oil prices extend gains as Trump comments diminish hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
summary: President Trump's comments that the Iran ceasefire is on "life support" have raised concerns about prolonged Middle East conflict, driving oil prices higher on Tuesday. The uncertainty around U.S.-Iran relations continues to impact global energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

zh.title: 随着特朗普评论降低美国-伊朗和平协议希望，油价继续上涨
zh.summary: 特朗普关于伊朗停火处于"生死关头"的评论引发了对中东冲突延长的担忧，推高了周二的油价。美国-伊朗关系周围的不确定性继续影响全球能源市场。

title: Asia markets rise as investors brush off Trump’s ceasefire warning
summary: Despite Trump's warnings about the fragility of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, Asia-Pacific markets posted gains Tuesday as investors remained relatively optimistic. The region's resilience suggests confidence in economic fundamentals despite geopolitical concerns.
content: Asia-Pacific markets rise as investors shrugged off fresh doubts over the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

zh.title: 亚洲市场上升，投资者对特朗普停火警告不以为然
zh.summary: 尽管特朗普警告美国-伊朗停火的脆弱性，亚太市场在周二录得涨幅，投资者保持相对乐观。该地区的韧性表明，尽管存在地缘政治担忧，但对经济基本面充满信心。

title: China should stop hoarding food and fertiliser, says former World Bank chief
summary: Former World Bank chief David Malpass called on China to stop stockpiling food and fertilizer, with his comments coming as Trump and Xi Jinping prepare for meetings in Beijing. The remarks highlight concerns about global supply chains and market stability amid U.S.-China tensions.
content: David Malpass' comments come as US President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping are due to meet in Beijing.

zh.title: 前世界银行行长表示中国应停止囤积食品和化肥
zh.summary: 前世界银行行长大卫·马尔帕斯呼吁中国停止囤积食品和肥料，他的评论恰逢特朗普和习近平准备在北京举行会议之际。这些言论突显了美中紧张局势中对全球供应链和市场稳定性的担忧。
